creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #9)

Here is the code now: https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/blob/507fb2089d38f9698af58de7c814c59e6a062df5/src/share/poudriere/jail.sh#L1367-L1373

Except for the default value it looks like your code now. Is the request satisfied?
